artifacts.claimText: AI Gateway is listed for Carnegie Mellon University in an official university AI tools source. Derived availability: conditionally allowed. Derived endorsement type: self hosted system.
artifacts.normalizedValue: {"tool":"self_deploy","rawToolName":"AI Gateway","description":"AI developer tool that makes AI models easier to access via API keys.","howToObtain":"Use CMU AI Gateway service page.","costToUser":"No cost, but an Oracle String is required to pass on model endpoint costs.","availability":"conditionally_allowed","endorsementType":"self_hosted_system"}
